scripts.dev: dotenvx run -- sh -c 'turbo dev --filter=@glitchgrab/web --filter=@glitchgrab/recordly-extension & npm run dev --prefix apps/glitchrecord; wait'
scripts.db:generate: cd apps/web && dotenvx run -f ../../.env -- prisma generate
scripts.db:push: cd apps/web && dotenvx run -f ../../.env -- prisma db push
scripts.db:deploy: cd apps/web && dotenvx run -f ../../.env -- prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/web && dotenvx run -f ../../.env -- prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:studio: cd apps/web && dotenvx run -f ../../.env -- prisma studio
scripts.db:reset: cd apps/web && dotenvx run -f ../../.env -- prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.razorpay:create-plans: cd apps/web && dotenvx run -f ../../.env -- bun run scripts/create-razorpay-plans.ts
